instruction.text:
Match the words with their definitions.
වචන ඒවායේ අර්ථයන් සමඟ යා කරන්න.
  சொற்களை அவற்றின் விளக்கங்களுடன் பொருத்துக.

content.item_b: to formally test and activate an electrical installation to ensure it operates safely and according to design specifications
to adjust measuring instruments, such as multimetres or sensors, to ensure accurate electrical readings
to supply electrical power to a circuit or system so that it becomes operational
to connect and coordinate different electrical components so they function as a unified system
to match the frequency and phase of electrical systems, especially when connecting generators or power sources

instruction.text:
Match the words with their definitions.
වචන ඒවායේ අර්ථයන් සමඟ යා කරන්න.
  சொற்களை அவற்றின் விளக்கங்களுடன் பொருத்துக.

content.item_b: to correct or repair an electrical defect so that the system functions properly again
to protect cables or components from electromagnetic interference by using conductive or insulated barriers
to restore power or system functionality after maintenance or fault correction
to systematically identify and resolve electrical faults by testing components, circuits, and system performance
to resist electrical stress, voltage surges, heat, or load without failure or insulation breakdown

instruction.text:
Read the following sentences and click on the correct question. 
පහත වාක්‍ය කියවන්න. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න.
பின்வரும் வாக்கியங்களை வாசித்து, சரியான கேள்வியைக் கிளிக் செய்யவும்.

content.question: No, there aren’t. In fact, there aren’t any circuit breakers in the main distribution panel at the moment.
options: Is there a circuit breaker in the main distribution panel?
Are the circuit breakers in the main distribution panel?
Are there any circuit breakers in the main distribution panel?
content.answer: Are there any circuit breakers in the main distribution panel?

content.question: No, I don’t. But I document the voltage readings every evening after the system inspection.
options: Do you record the voltage readings every morning?
Are the voltage readings recorded every morning?
When do you record the voltage readings?
content.answer: Do you record the voltage readings every morning?

content.question: No, he doesn’t. He rarely inspects the switchgear on Monday mornings. He usually tests it on Tuesday mornings.
options: Does the technician inspect the switchgear on Monday mornings?
Do you inspect the switchgear on Monday mornings?
Is the switchgear inspected on Monday mornings?
content.answer: Does the technician inspect the switchgear on Monday mornings?

content.question: I am calibrating the multimetre manually because the digital monitoring system is malfunctioning. I always calibrate it manually when the automated system fails.
options: Why are you calibrating the multimetre manually?
Do you calibrate the multimetre manually?
Why do you calibrate the multimetre manually?
content.answer: Why are you calibrating the multimetre manually?

content.question: I’m afraid he can’t. He has to attend a compliance inspection tomorrow afternoon, and no replacement technician has been allocated.
options: Can he supervise the final panel installation tomorrow afternoon?
Does he supervise the final panel installation tomorrow afternoon?
Does he go to supervise the final panel installation tomorrow afternoon?
content.answer: Can he supervise the final panel installation tomorrow afternoon?

content.question: I review updated electrical standards. I usually analyse one regulation every Saturday, but this weekend I am going to examine several revised specifications.
options: What do you usually do during the weekend?
What are you going to do this weekend?
Are you going to do something this weekend?
content.answer: What do you usually do during the weekend?

content.question: I think the revised wiring layout is even more complex than the previous one.
options: What do you think of this revised wiring layout?
Why is this revised wiring layout more complex?
Is this revised wiring layout complex more than the previous one?
content.answer: What do you think of this revised wiring layout?

content.question: I think it is extremely demanding. In fact, it is the most complicated load distribution system we have ever installed.
options: What do you think of this load distribution system?
Why do you think this load distribution system is demanding?
Is this load distribution system demanding more than the previous ones?
content.answer: What do you think of this load distribution system?

content.question: Yes, they are. In fact, they are the least efficient transformers we have ever tested.
options: Do you think these transformers are less efficient than the previous batch?
Why are these transformers more less efficient?
Are these transformers more less efficient than the previous batch?
content.answer: Do you think these transformers are less efficient than the previous batch?

content.question: No, they were inspected late yesterday evening.
options: Were these control panels inspected this morning?
Were you inspected these control panels this morning?
When did you inspect these control panels?
content.answer: Were these control panels inspected this morning?

instruction.text:
Choose the correct negative sentence. 
නිවැරදි නිශේධාර්ථ වාක්‍යය තෝරන්න.

content.question: She will calibrate the pressure sensor tomorrow morning before inspection.
options: She will not calibrating the pressure sensor tomorrow morning before inspection.
She will not calibrated the pressure sensor tomorrow morning before inspection.
She will not calibrate the pressure sensor tomorrow morning before inspection.
content.answer: She will not calibrate the pressure sensor tomorrow morning before inspection.

content.question: They completed the network upgrade yesterday afternoon.
options: They have not completed the network upgrade yesterday afternoon.
They did not complete the network upgrade yesterday afternoon.
They has not complete the network upgrade yesterday afternoon.
content.answer: They did not complete the network upgrade yesterday afternoon.

content.question: We are monitoring the backup generator right now in the workshop.
options: We are not monitor the backup generator right now in workshop.
We not are monitoring the backup generator right now in workshop.
We are not monitoring the backup generator right now in the workshop.
content.answer: We are not monitoring the backup generator right now in the workshop.

content.question: He should submit the compliance report today before the meeting.
options: He should not submitted the compliance report today before meeting.
He should not submitting the compliance report today before meeting.
He should not submit the compliance report today before the meeting.
content.answer: He should not submit the compliance report today before the meeting.

content.question: I inspected the structural alignment yesterday during the final review.
options: I did not inspected the structural alignment yesterday during review.
I not did inspect the structural alignment yesterday during review.
I did not inspect the structural alignment yesterday during the final review.
content.answer: I did not inspect the structural alignment yesterday during the final review.

instruction.text:
Choose the correct question. 
නිවැරදි ප්‍රශ්නය තෝරන්න. 
சரியான வினாவைத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும்.

content.question: She updated the firmware late last night after maintenance.
options: Did she updated the firmware late last night after maintenance?
Was she update the firmware late last night after maintenance?
Did she update the firmware late last night after maintenance?
content.answer: Did she update the firmware late last night after maintenance?

options: Do they reviewing the safety checklist right now in office?
Are they review the safety checklist right now in office?
Are they reviewing the safety checklist right now in the office?
content.answer: Are they reviewing the safety checklist right now in the office?

content.question: He replaced the faulty valve this morning.
options: Did he replaced the faulty valve this morning?
Did he replace the faulty valve this morning?
Has he replace the faulty valve this morning?
content.answer: Did he replace the faulty valve this morning?

content.question: We are going to finalise the technical assessment tomorrow afternoon.
options: Are we going to finalised the technical assessment tomorrow afternoon?
Do we go to finalise the technical assessment tomorrow afternoon?
Are we going to finalise the technical assessment tomorrow afternoon?
content.answer: Are we going to finalise the technical assessment tomorrow afternoon?

content.question: The control system was activated earlier this morning.
options: Was the control system activate earlier this morning today?
Did the control system was activated earlier this morning?
Was the control system activated earlier this morning?
content.answer: Was the control system activated earlier this morning?

content.question: They will implement the revised protocol next week.
options: When will they implemented the revised protocol?
Why will they implementing the revised protocol?
When will they implement the revised protocol?
content.answer: When will they implement the revised protocol?

content.question: She repaired the hydraulic unit late yesterday evening.
options: When did she repaired the hydraulic unit?
Why did she repairing the hydraulic unit?
When did she repair the hydraulic unit?
content.answer: When did she repair the hydraulic unit?

content.question: We are analysing the system performance right now.
options: When do you analysed the system performance?
How long are you analysing the system performance?
What are you doing now?
content.answer: What are you doing now?

content.question: He went there to configure the new software programme.
options: Why is he going to the engineering department?
Why he went to the engineering department?
Why did he go to the engineering department?
content.answer: Why did he go to the engineering department?

content.question: They transported the equipment to the remote facility.
options: How are they transporting the equipment to?
How far did they transported the equipment to?
Where did they transport the equipment to?
content.answer: Where did they transport the equipment to?

instruction.text:
Rearrange these sentences in the correct order. The first word of each sentence starts with a capital letter.
මෙම වාක්‍යයන් නිවැරදි අනුපිළිවෙලට නැවත සකසන්න. සෑම වාක්‍යයකම පළමු වචනය විශාල අකුරින් ආරම්භ වේ.
இந்த வாக்கியங்களை சரியான வரிசையில் மறுசீரமைக்கவும். ஒவ்வொரு வாக்கியத்தின் முதல் வார்த்தையும் பெரிய எழுத்தில் தொடங்குகிறது.

content.sentence: The technician calibrates voltage regulators every Monday morning.
The distribution panel was upgraded during last week's inspection.
The engineers are testing the backup generator now.
The circuit breaker is being replaced this afternoon.
The electrician does not ignore unusual current fluctuations.
The team did not isolate the faulty transformer.
The supervisor is not authorising system activation today.
Do the technicians verify insulation resistance values?
Did the engineer inspect the switchgear yesterday?
Is the operator going to reconfigure the network?

instruction.text:
Read the following answers and click on the correct question. 
පහත සඳහන් පිළිතුරු කියවා නිවැරදි ප්‍රශ්නය ක්ලික් කරන්න.
பின்வரும் பதில்களைப் படித்து சரியான கேள்வியைக் கிளிக் செய்யவும்.

content.question: No, he didn’t. He was confused about the safety procedures.
options: Did he meet the technical rep on time?
Did he understand the safety instructions clearly?
Did he attend the training session yesterday?
content.answer: Did he understand the safety instructions clearly?

content.question: No, they didn’t. The system is still not functioning properly.
options: Did they complete the installation successfully?
Did they scheduled the maintenance for next week?
Did they request additional equipment?
content.answer: Did they complete the installation successfully?

content.question: No, she didn’t. The root cause remains unclear.
options: Did she analyse the data thoroughly?
Did she identify the source of the fault?
Did she update the project timeline?
content.answer: Did she identify the source of the fault?

content.question: No, he didn’t. He said it still needs minor adjustments.
options: Did the supervisor read the proposal immediately?
Did the supervisor revise the proposal carefully?
Did the supervisor reject the proposal outright?
content.answer: Did the supervisor reject the proposal outright?

content.question: No, they didn’t. That is why the alignment is incorrect.
options: Did they verify the measurements before construction?
Did they transport the materials safely?
Did they inspect the finished structure?
content.answer: Did they verify the measurements before construction?

content.question: No, she didn’t. She stopped the system immediately.
options: Did she consult the manual before operating the device?
Did she replaced the defective component?
Did she ignore the warning message on the screen?
content.answer: Did she ignore the warning message on the screen?

content.question: No, he didn’t. He used his own method instead.
options: Did he evaluate the risks carefully?
Did he follow the recommended procedure?
Did he contact the supplier yesterday?
content.answer: Did he follow the recommended procedure?

content.question: No, they didn’t. The same problem occurred again.
options: Did they allocate sufficient time for testing?
Did they document the inspection findings?
Did they resolve the issue permanently?
content.answer: Did they resolve the issue permanently?

content.question: No, she didn’t. It moved during operation.
options: Did she secure the equipment properly?
Did she transport the equipment carefully?
Did she label the equipment clearly?
content.answer: Did she secure the equipment properly?

content.question: No, he didn’t. That is why the final output was incorrect.
options: Did he complete the maintenance checklist?
Did he understand the client’s requirements?
Did he schedule the follow-up inspection?
content.answer: Did he understand the client’s requirements?

content.question: No, they didn’t. The project timeline was unrealistic.
options: Did they conduct a risk assessment beforehand?
Did they finalised the contract yesterday?
Did they anticipate the potential delays?
content.answer: Did they anticipate the potential delays?

content.question: No, she didn’t. She applied them correctly.
options: Did she review the updated guidelines carefully?
Did she distribute the documents to everyone?
Did she misunderstand the revised instructions?
content.answer: Did she misunderstand the revised instructions?

content.question: No, he didn’t. The deviation remained unnoticed.
options: Did he calibrate the equipment accurately?
Did he detect the performance deviation?
Did he replace the monitoring system?
content.answer: Did he detect the performance deviation?

content.question: No, they didn’t. Several team members were confused.
options: Did they communicate the changes clearly?
Did they postpone the meeting again?
Did they expand the production capacity?
content.answer: Did they communicate the changes clearly?

content.question: No, she didn’t. She reported every issue immediately.
options: Did she comply with the safety standards?
Did she document the inspection results?
Did she overlook the minor defect?
content.answer: Did she overlook the minor defect?

instruction.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice. Then click on the correct answer. Read the questions first. 
පළමුව ප්‍රශ්න කියවන්න. පසුව දෙවරක් වාදනය වන දෙබසට සවන් දෙන්න. ඉන්පසු නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න.
பதிவை இரண்டு முறை கேட்பீர்கள், கவனமாகக் கேளுங்கள். பிறகு சரியான பதிலைக் கிளிக் செய்யவும். முதலில் கேள்விகளை வாசிக்கவும்.

content.question: Why was the meeting organised?
content.answer: To ensure the electrical section complies with updated fire safety regulations.
options: To discuss new electrical installations for the workshop.
To ensure no wiring errors could cause safety hazards.
To ensure the electrical section complies with updated fire safety regulations.
To introduce advanced switchgear equipment.

content.question: What do the previous fire incidents suggest about the electrical workshop?
content.answer: Improper handling of electrical components and materials can create preventable fire risks.
options: Major electrical fires are common occurrences and are to be expected.
Fire alarms were malfunctioning at the time.
Improper handling of electrical components and materials can create preventable fire risks.
Circuit breakers were permanently damaged.

content.question: Why must portable testing metres and extension reels be relocated?
content.answer: They may obstruct emergency exits during evacuation procedures.
options: They are outdated and no longer functional.
They interfere with switchgear calibration.
They reduce technician productivity.
They may obstruct emergency exits during evacuation procedures.

content.question: How aware are technicians of current evacuation procedures?
content.answer: Some technicians may require further training and regular practice.
options: All staff are fully trained and certified.
Evacuation policies have not yet been introduced.
Only supervisors understand emergency guidelines.
Some technicians may require further training and regular practice.

content.question: Why are two fire extinguishers being replaced?
content.answer: They failed to meet compliance standards during inspection.
options: They were damaged during load testing.
They failed to meet compliance standards during inspection.
They were incorrectly labelled.
They were positioned too far from the control panel.

content.question: How would you describe management’s response to the updated guidelines?
content.answer: Organised and proactive in strengthening electrical safety procedures.
options: Hesitant and resistant to change.
Limited only to documentation updates.
Focused solely on high-voltage areas.
Organised and proactive in strengthening electrical safety procedures.

content.question: I didn’t ____________ so many companies to attend.
options: aspect
expect
except
content.answer: expect

content.question: I visited the ____________ of MAS Holdings first.
options: booth
both
boot
content.answer: booth

content.question: They ____________ soft skills more than technical grades.
options: empathised
emphatic
emphasised
content.answer: emphasised

content.question: At John Keells, they asked whether I ____________ newspapers regularly.
options: red
reed
read
content.answer: read

content.question: They said interns must be ____________ and confident during presentations.
options: adoptable
adaptable
adept
content.answer: adaptable

content.question: I’m going to ____________ by bus.
options: commute
communicate
compute
content.answer: commute
